prompt: An imaginative collage of marine life, where tropical fish swim through a backdrop of outer space, blending oceanic and cosmic elements seamlessly.
prompt_refined: An imaginative collage depicting colorful tropical fish dynamically swimming within a vast outer space backdrop. The cosmic environment, featuring swirling nebulae, twinkling stars, and ethereal planets, seamlessly integrates with the aquatic elements, creating a unified and fantastical blend of oceanic and cosmic realms.
